MALTA FINANCIAL SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT (PANEUROPEAN PERSONAL PENSION PRODUCT (PEPP))

[ L.S.330.16

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 330.16
REGOLAMENTI DWAR MALTA FINANCIAL
SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT (PAN-EUROPEAN
PERSONAL PENSION PRODUCT (PEPP))
1 ta’ Lulju, 2022 *

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 133 tal-2022.

Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti daħlu fis-seħħ bl-Avviż Legali 197 tal-2022.

1
